user_query:
I need to orchestrate a small, verifiable data-to-brief workflow for an entrepreneurship policy memo. Please do the following, using only the provided local files:

1) Run the aggregator to produce a summary JSON from the TSV dataset: generate data/summary.json by running the provided script over input/entrepreneurship.tsv. Use the script as-is and do not modify input files or tests.

2) Validate the summary: run python tests/validate_summary.py data/summary.json. It should exit with status 0 and print "OK".

3) Update the brief: in docs/policy_brief.md, replace the content between the markers <!-- START DATA SUMMARY --> and <!-- END DATA SUMMARY --> with a short, data-driven section that includes:
   - One line: "Overall average new business formation rate per 1,000 residents: {value}" where {value} is the overall average from data/summary.json rounded to two decimals.
   - A ranked list (three lines) of the top 3 regions by rate, in this exact format using two decimals: 
     1) RegionName: X.XX per 1,000
     2) RegionName: X.XX per 1,000
     3) RegionName: X.XX per 1,000
   Keep all other parts of the brief unchanged.

4) Check consistency: run python tests/check_brief_consistency.py. It should exit with status 0 and print "CONSISTENT".

Deliverables:
- data/summary.json created by the script.
- The updated docs/policy_brief.md with the Data Summary section rewritten as specified.

Constraints:
- Do not change input/entrepreneurship.tsv or any files under tests/.
- Use the provided aggregator (scripts/aggregate.py) to generate the summary; do not hardcode numbers.
- Ensure both validation commands pass.
 All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
